title: System Stability
summary: This page concludes an example showing that a cascade system can be BIBO-stable while containing an asymptotically unstable subsystem, using the composite impulse response h(t) = e^−t u(t). It emphasizes that BIBO stability does not always imply asymptotic stability, then introduces Example 2.14 on investigating asymptotic and BIBO stability for several LTIC differential equations.
